raw_nodes.title: Chapter–14: Semiconductor Electronics: Materials, Devices and Simple Circuits
raw_nodes.source_text: Chapter–14: Semiconductor Electronics: Materials, Devices and Simple Circuits

subtopics: Need for measurement, Units of measurement, Systems of units
key_concepts: SI units (fundamental and derived), Significant figures, Uncertainty in result, Dimensions of physical quantities, Dimensional analysis and applications

subtopics: Frame of reference, Elementary concepts of differentiation and integration
key_concepts: Uniform and non-uniform motion, Average speed/velocity, Instantaneous velocity, Uniformly accelerated motion (graphical & calculus), Velocity-time graphs, Position-time graphs

subtopics: Scalar and vector quantities, Vector operations (addition, subtraction, multiplication by scalar)
key_concepts: Position/displacement vectors, Unit vectors, Resolution of vectors in a plane, Rectangular components, Scalar and Vector products, Projectile motion, Uniform circular motion

subtopics: Concepts of force and inertia, Newton's laws (1st, 2nd, 3rd)
key_concepts: Momentum, Impulse, Conservation of linear momentum, Equilibrium of concurrent forces, Static/Kinetic/Rolling friction, Lubrication, Dynamics of uniform circular motion, Centripetal force (vehicle on level/banked road)

subtopics: Work done (constant/variable force), Kinetic energy
key_concepts: Work-energy theorem, Power, Potential energy (including spring), Conservative and non-conservative forces, Motion in vertical circle, Elastic and inelastic collisions (1D & 2D)

units.unit_name: Motion of System of Particles and Rigid Body
explicit_chapters: System of Particles and Rotational Motion

chapters.chapter_name: System of Particles and Rotational Motion
chapters.source_chapter_name: System of Particles and Rotational Motion
chapters.source_heading: System of Particles and Rotational Motion
subtopics: Centre of mass (two-particle system, rigid body, uniform rod)
key_concepts: Momentum conservation and CM motion, Torque, Angular momentum, Conservation of angular momentum, Equilibrium of rigid bodies, Rigid body rotation equations, Linear vs Rotational motions comparison, Moment of inertia (simple geometrical objects), Radius of gyration

subtopics: Kepler's laws, Universal law of gravitation
key_concepts: Acceleration due to gravity (variation with altitude/depth), Gravitational potential energy and potential, Escape speed, Orbital velocity of satellite, Energy of an orbiting satellite

subtopics: Elasticity, Stress-strain relationship
key_concepts: Hooke's law, Young’s modulus, Bulk modulus, Shear modulus (qualitative), Poisson's ratio, Elastic energy, Applications of elastic behavior (qualitative)

subtopics: Fluid pressure, Pascal's law
key_concepts: Viscosity (Stokes' law, terminal velocity), Flow types (streamline/turbulent/critical), Bernoulli's theorem and applications (Torricelli's law/Dynamic lift), Surface tension concepts (surface energy, angle of contact, excess pressure), Applications to drops/bubbles/capillary rise

subtopics: Heat and temperature, Thermal expansion (solids/liquids/gases/anomalous water)
key_concepts: Specific heat capacity (Cp/Cv), Calorimetry, Change of state/Latent heat, Heat transfer modes (conduction/convection/radiation), Blackbody radiation concepts (Wein's law/Stefan's law)

subtopics: Zeroth law, First and Second laws
key_concepts: Thermal equilibrium/temperature definition, Heat/work/internal energy, Thermodynamic state variables/equation of state, Gaseous processes (isothermal, adiabatic, reversible, irreversible, cyclic)

units.unit_name: Behaviour of Perfect Gases and Kinetic Theory of Gases

subtopics: Equation of state, Work done in compressing gas
key_concepts: Kinetic theory assumptions/pressure concept, Kinetic interpretation of temperature, RMS speed, Degrees of freedom, Law of equi-partition (statement), Specific heat capacities, Mean free path, Avogadro's number

subtopics: Periodic motion characteristics
key_concepts: Time period, Frequency, Displacement as function of time, Periodic functions applications, Simple Harmonic Motion (S.H.M), Uniform circular motion and equations
Wave properties and behavior

topics: Electric charges and Conservation of charge
subtopics: Coulomb's law, forces between multiple charges, superposition principle, continuous charge distribution
key_concepts: Electric field due to point charge, electric dipole, torque on dipole
Gauss's theorem applications: infinite wire, plane sheet, spherical shell

subtopics: Potential due to point charge, dipole, system of charges; equipotential surfaces
Conductors, insulators, dielectrics, polarization
key_concepts: Capacitors and capacitance, series/parallel combinations
Parallel plate capacitor with/without dielectric, energy stored in a capacitor

subtopics: Drift velocity, mobility, V-I characteristics (linear/non-linear)
Electrical energy, power, resistivity, conductivity, temperature dependence of resistance
key_concepts: Internal resistance, emf, combination of cells
Kirchhoff's rules, Wheatstone bridge

units.unit_name: Unit-III Magnetic Effects of Current and Magnetism

subtopics: Oersted's experiment, Biot-Savart law (circular loop), Ampere's law (wire)
Force on moving charge and current-carrying conductor
Torque on current loop, magnetic dipole moment
key_concepts: Moving coil galvanometer: sensitivity, conversion to ammeter/voltmeter
Definition of ampere via force between parallel conductors
Bar magnet as equivalent solenoid (qualitative)

units.unit_name: Unit-IV Electromagnetic Induction and Alternating Currents

key_concepts: Electromagnetic induction
Alternating current
Electromagnetic waves
